evidence_hint: src/schema.ts:117-123 FieldDiff (action union inline) and src/reconcile_fields.ts:14-22 FieldDiff (action:ReconcileAction) are two structurally identical definitions. inject.ts:13 imports FieldDiff from ./schema yet writeInjection (inject.ts:110) receives diffs from reconcileFields. index.ts:6-7 exports both (FieldDiff and ReconcileFieldDiff).
residual_if_not_resolved: Delete reconcile_fields.FieldDiff; import canonical FieldDiff + exported action type from schema.ts in reconcile_fields.ts and inject.ts; drop the duplicate public export.
